name: strike
description: Workflow and utility skills for scoped agent-assisted project delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Project workflow skills for durable planning, implementation, review, and readiness
interface.longDescription: Strike packages a board-and-card workflow plus focused utilities for agent-assisted project delivery. Use it to start project cards, sharpen rough ideas, make decisions, research only where useful, write specs, slice implementation phases, build, review phases, check readiness, capture retros, make planning demos, keep language consistent, and visualize systems while keeping runtime state in the consuming repository.
defaultPrompt: Start a Strike card for this project idea.
Show the next Strike step for this card.
Use Strike to plan and implement this project.
